name: ITSM Operations
description: ITSM Operations Command Center — an ITIL 4-aligned multi-agent digital worker that orchestrates 13 child workers across Incident, Change, Problem, Asset/CMDB, SLA, Knowledge, Vendor, Service Desk, Monitoring, Release, Capacity, Continuity, and Security management practices. Grounded in ITIL 4 and NIST 800-53.

conversation_starters.title: ITSM Operations Briefing
conversation_starters.text: Give me my ITSM operations briefing. What's happening across incidents, problems, changes, and SLAs?

conversation_starters.title: Incident Dashboard
conversation_starters.text: Show me all active incidents. Are there any P1s or P2s?

conversation_starters.title: Problem Backlog
conversation_starters.text: Show me the problem dashboard. How many known errors do we have?

conversation_starters.title: SLA Compliance
conversation_starters.text: Show me the SLA compliance dashboard. Are any SLAs breached or at risk?

conversation_starters.title: Change Risk Briefing
conversation_starters.text: Give me the change risk briefing. Any collisions or high-risk changes?

conversation_starters.title: Search Knowledge Base
conversation_starters.text: Search the knowledge base for Oracle failover procedures.

conversation_starters.title: Triage My ITSM Inbox
conversation_starters.text: Triage my inbox — what ITSM items need my attention today?

conversation_starters.title: Upcoming CAB Meetings
conversation_starters.text: Find any upcoming CAB meetings and show me what changes are on the agenda.

conversation_starters.title: Service Catalog
conversation_starters.text: Show me the service catalog. What services can users request?

conversation_starters.title: Active Monitoring Alerts
conversation_starters.text: Are there any active monitoring alerts or events that need attention?

conversation_starters.title: Security & DR Posture
conversation_starters.text: Give me a security posture overview and DR readiness status.

conversation_starters.title: Capacity & Release
conversation_starters.text: Review infrastructure capacity and upcoming release schedule.
